title: Player Difficulty
intro: The Difficulty System lets you voluntarily handicap your character in exchange for greater rewards. Similar to the Champion System, you choose the level of challenge — the harder you make it on yourself, the more you earn. There are **10 difficulty levels**, each unlocked by reaching a specific Rebirth count.

figure.alt: Difficulty Selection panel showing all 10 levels
figure.caption: The Difficulty Selection panel — 10 levels each reducing your damage and resistances.

tables.title: Difficulty Levels
tables.preText: Each level applies penalties to your character's damage output and resistances. Higher levels are progressively more punishing — but the rewards scale to match:

rewardsFigure.title: Rewards & Detailed Stats
rewardsFigure.caption: Detailed reward breakdown — use the **Detailed Information** button in-game for the full stats per level.

howItWorks.title: How to Use It
steps: Open the Community Board (`Alt+B`) and select **Player Difficulty**.
Check your current Rebirth count — only levels you have unlocked will be available.
Click **Detailed Information** to preview the full penalty and reward breakdown per level.
Click **Select** on the level you want to activate.
To remove the handicap, click **Disable Difficulty**.

infoBoxes.label: Rebirth Gate
infoBoxes.body: Each difficulty level is **locked behind a Rebirth requirement**. You cannot select a higher level until you have completed the required number of rebirths — difficulty and character progression are intentionally linked.

infoBoxes.label: Zone Scaling Warning
infoBoxes.body: Your difficulty level applies across *all* zones — including more advanced ones you move into as you progress. If you push to a higher zone and find yourself dying or unable to farm efficiently, **lower your difficulty level** until your gear and rebirths catch up. Never sacrifice farming efficiency trying to hold a difficulty tier that's above your current power level.

infoBoxes.label: Strategy
infoBoxes.body: Run the highest difficulty level where you can still farm efficiently. As you complete more rebirths and your gear improves, push the level up one step at a time — the reward gains compound quickly at higher levels.
